# Vault
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Vault&prop=wikitext

[[File:Vault-0.png|thumb|80x80px]]
The vault is the private room for every player. It's main function is storing your items in chests, but a lot of other things can be done here:
[[File:Chests.png|thumb|104x104px]]
* Change your skin
* Join galaxies
* Use your potion storage
* Design your skill tree
* Customize your runes setup

Here you will also find the Spaceship, which is used to join galaxies, but has some other interactions (check Spaceship for further info).
